title: Wire transfer limit increase
summary: Customer requested a same-day increase to a large outgoing transfer limit.

title: Mismatch between legal name and tax record
summary: Submitted onboarding documents do not match the tax entity name on file.

title: Urgent card spending unlock for travel
summary: Priority customer requested an urgent temporary spending unlock before international travel.

title: Business account name correction
summary: Submitted legal documents to correct the registered business name.

title: Repeated beneficiary bank update
summary: Beneficiary bank details have been updated twice in 24 hours for the same payout profile.

title: Document resubmission after prior rejection
summary: Customer resubmitted compliance documents after prior corrections and they have been approved.

title: Manual payout review for new destination country
summary: Large payout requested to a destination country not previously used by this account.

title: Low-value address change request
summary: Customer requested an address change with supporting utility bill.

title: Repeated payout destination change
summary: Third payout destination change requested in two days for the same merchant account.

title: Escalated source-of-funds clarification
summary: Case was escalated after conflicting explanations about source of funds.

title: Rejected duplicate business verification
summary: Duplicate verification submission for a business already verified under the same legal entity.

title: Priority customer ownership update
summary: Ownership structure changed and new beneficial owner documents were uploaded.
